fresh_session_restart_metadata.discipline_source: M11a-extension D14-H6 per-trace fresh-session discipline; this is the fresh-session per-trace kickoff for test_v33 acceptance under M11a-extension-extension Commit C3

self_restate_response_verbatim:
Authoring exactly one new EventTrace named test_trace_v33 for the sandbox harness this session — the third M11a-extension-extension Commit C trace, advancing the path toward the combined-N=40 sample target after test_v31 (C1) and test_v32 (C2) acceptance. Restating the four structural constraints in my own paraphrase below, distinct from any prior M11a-extension Commit C1..C10 self-restate response and from the M11a-extension-extension C1 + C2 self-restate responses:

(a) Top-of-module Python literal expression resolvable at the standard `from __future__ import annotations` + `from dataclasses import dataclass` import-time context active in sandbox/event_trace.py. Every position in the trace block — Event constructors, _gt helper calls, tuple literals, the briefing string, the intents tuple — binds to a value the interpreter can construct directly without referring back to a session-state side-channel, a closure-captured generator, or a sandbox.world subclass-registration step that must complete before `get_trace('test_v33')` returns.

(b) Walrus assignment-expression `:=` token kept entirely out of the test_trace_v33 definition. The historical failure mode where a walrus inside a field-default position trapped a Python-3.8-syntax-error at import time does not recur in this trace.

(c) Each of the nine Event.id strings inside test_trace_v33 is authored as a single static literal at draft time. No `+` concatenation operator at the id keyword, no f-string with an embedded arithmetic-evaluation that resolves to a numeric component, no `str()`-cast on a digit. The id strings are verified literal-substring-stable through the Step 3.5 pre-flight check before audit-gate evaluation.

(d) Avoid the 235 prior banned event_ids, the 132 banned semantic themes, and the 131 banned keyword tuples enumerated in the iteratively-extended banned-list. The avoidance protocol the audit-gate inherits verbatim from M11a-extension D-C1.3 and threads through M11a-extension-extension C1 + C2 carries forward to C3: step 3a bytewise set-intersection on 235 banned IDs (0/235 required); step 3b per-GT semantic theme hand-audit vs the 132 banned themes with per-GT distinguishing-qualifier defense; step 3c bytewise tuple intersection (0/131 required); step 4 cross-trace literal-ID HALT-gate against the 235-prior-ID union across 27 prior trace definitions including test_v31 + test_v32 (HALTs the M11a-extension-extension milestone on any collision per §D9 Surface #1); step 5 cross-trace GT-tuple bytewise intersection across 27 prior trace GT tuples; step 6 ≥8-token verbatim phrase intersection against the ~13500+ prior dev/test 8-grams across content + briefing + intents fields including the newly-landed test_v31 + test_v32. The audit-step-6 8-gram check remains the mechanical safety net for the boilerplate-template draft-time author-judgment failure mode tightened at M11a-extension C10 and inherited verbatim into M11a-extension-extension C1 + C2 (boilerplate-paraphrase author-discipline applied at draft time to all 4 V2 EXISTING NO distractor closings + briefing/intents formulaic clauses).

Design choice at C3 per locked plan §D1 + §D7 + Non-goals #1 + #2: test_v33 ships 5 V2 EXISTING YES GTs + 4 V2 EXISTING NO distractors + 0 V4 NEW touches. V2 YES coverage at C3 entry was urgent-safety 10× / schedule-change 9× / financial/deadline 10× (UNCHANGED at C2) / production/on-call 8× / message/delivery 9× / weather-alert 8×; lifts at C3 → financial/deadline 10×→11× (was UNCHANGED-skipped at C2 — natural lift candidate restoring balance) + schedule-change 9×→10× + production/on-call 8×→9× + message/delivery 9×→10× + weather-alert 8×→9× + SKIP urgent-safety 10× (UNCHANGED-at-C3 from tied-for-maximum, just-lifted-at-C2 default-preserve skip-the-highest pattern). V2 NO coverage at C3 entry was routine-status 9× / marketing/newsletter 9× (UNCHANGED at C2) / generic-daily-briefing 9× / feature-announcement 8× / social-channel-invite 7×; lifts at C3 → marketing/newsletter 9×→10× (was UNCHANGED-skipped at C2 — natural lift candidate restoring balance) + routine-status 9×→10× + feature-announcement 8×→9× + social-channel-invite 7×→8× + SKIP generic-daily-briefing 9× (UNCHANGED-at-C3 from tied-for-maximum-among-V2-NO, lifted-at-C1+C2 default-preserve skip-the-highest pattern). Zero V4 NEW touches preserves M11a-extension C10 + M11a-extension-extension C1 + C2 cross-V4-mechanism symmetric closure at V4 NEW YES 6 vs V4 NEW NO 6 = delta 0 bytewise into C3 scope per §D7 + §D14-H1; mechanism-residual closure remains M11d-surprise-gate-retuning + V5 future-work scope per Non-goals #1 + #2.

Per-GT distinguishing-qualifier hand-audit vs the 132 banned themes (Step 3b semantic): GT1 IRS §1031 like-kind exchange identification window is real-estate-deferred-capital-gain mechanism + Internal Revenue Code section-ten-thirty-one + Qualified Intermediary IPX1031 portal + 45-day identification-window + Form 8824 reporting — entirely distinct from prior banned financial/deadline themes (mortgage rate-lock / Q3 estimated-tax / ISO exercise window / FBAR foreign-account / HELOC draw period / Roth IRA conversion / Schwab tax-loss harvest / Northwestern Mutual term-life convertibility-window); closest cousin is M11a-extension-extension C1 term_life_convertibility (insurance-contract-conversion vs real-estate-tax-deferral — distinct mechanism + entity + legal framework). GT2 UCLA Connie Frank kidney-transplant evaluation moved up is nephrology + transplant-medicine specialty + UNOS-waitlist-activation + living-donor sibling workup + eGFR-fourteen stage-five-CKD — entirely distinct from prior banned schedule-change themes (cardiology / court hearing / pediatric wellness / dental implant / USCIS interview / mortgage closing / orthopedist knee-MRI / IVF egg-retrieval / surgical-oncology breast-cancer); closest cousins are M11a-extension C9 orthopedist (knee MRI pre-op consult — orthopedics vs nephrology, surgical-versus-waitlist-decision) + M11a-extension-extension C2 surgical-oncology (breast-cancer staging-consult surgical-plan branch — surgical-oncology vs transplant-medicine). GT3 Snowflake compute-warehouse credit-burn is cloud-data-warehouse SaaS + cost-anomaly failure mode + auto-suspend policy + recursive-CTE cartesian-join + $40K/hour credit burn — entirely distinct from prior banned production/on-call themes (Postgres failover / TLS expiry / disk OOM / Redis eviction / Kafka broker election / Elasticsearch shard / Vault PKI / k8s ETCD-quorum); mechanistically distinct since Snowflake is compute-warehouse SaaS with credit-burn cost-anomaly NOT availability/latency failure. GT4 family-law attorney divorce mediation moved up is family-law / dissolution-of-marriage mediation + property-asset-disclosure Form FL-142 + QDRO pension-plan division + court-annex mediation suite — entirely distinct from prior banned message/delivery themes (legal-doc courier / jeweler pickup / hospital admitting / chemo ride / eviction-stay tenant attorney / estate executor / adoption placement / funeral-home director / police detective); closest cousins are M11a-extension C7 tenant_attorney (housing-law eviction-stay vs family-law dissolution mediation — different practice area + different paperwork) + M11a-extension-extension C1 funeral_home_director (death + interment paperwork-pickup vs divorce + property-settlement paperwork — different domain + different stakes). GT5 Pacific Tsunami Warning Center Alaska Aleutian-coast is seismic-induced ocean-wave hazard + 18-minute first-wave-ETA + magnitude-8.2 subduction-zone Shumagin Islands + Pacific Tsunami Warning Center Palmer + inundation-zone evacuation high-ground assembly — entirely distinct from prior banned weather-alert themes (flash flood / dust storm / tornado watch / wildfire smoke / ice storm glaze / heat dome / volcanic ash / hurricane storm-surge); closest cousins are M11a-extension-extension C2 hurricane storm-surge (atmospheric wind-driven coastal wave 36-hour mandatory-evacuation vs seismic-induced acute-onset 18-minute high-ground assembly — different mechanism + time-scale + protective protocol + source-agency) + M11a-extension-extension C1 volcanic-ash (airborne respiratory hazard sheltering vs hydrologic surge evacuation — different physical mechanism + protocol).

Banned-tuple bytewise check (Step 3c): the five new tuples (1031, intermediary) + (transplant, unos) + (snowflake, credit) + (mediation, qdro) + (tsunami, evacuation) have zero overlap with the 131 banned tuples enumerated in the iteratively-extended banned list — verified via mechanical set-intersection.

Distractor design (4 V2 EXISTING NO; boilerplate-paraphrase author-discipline carries forward verbatim M11a-extension C10 TIGHTENED scope applied at draft time): D1 Honeycomb production-observability weekly cardinality + query-performance digest (routine-status — distinct from prior banned routine-status themes including SSL monitor / k8s autoscaler / Datadog synthetic / GitHub Actions / Terraform / AWS Config / AWS CloudTrail / Sentry quarterly); D2 Lumière Atelier boutique-perfumery quarterly seasonal-fragrance release with single-origin botanical extracts (marketing/newsletter — distinct from prior banned marketing/newsletter themes including indie bookstore / camera-gear catalog / stationery catalog / games catalog / apparel catalog / coffee subscription / fountain-pen catalog); D3 JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 K2 Kotlin compiler stable + Multiplatform iOS-target preview launch (feature-announcement — distinct from prior banned feature-announcement themes including VSCode marketplace / Postman runner v11 / Linear cycles 2026 / Figma auto-layout v3 / Calendly v6 / AWS Step Functions distributed-map v2); D4 Pinterest weekly board-collaborator activity + follow-suggestion digest in design-aesthetics niche (social-channel-invite — distinct from prior banned social-channel-invite themes including Slack frontend / Mastodon follow / Bluesky starter-pack / Substack notes / Threads-by-Meta follow / Letterboxd friends-activity). All four distractor closings paraphrased uniquely at draft time to avoid the boilerplate-template draft-time author-judgment failure mode (no recycled launch-window-perks / pre-order-shipping / catalog-cadence / customer-service-closings / unsubscribe-instructions / next-run-timing closing patterns from prior distractor definitions).

Step 3.5 pre-flight keyword literal-substring verification (M11a-extension D-C2.attempt2.C + M11a-extension-extension D-C1/D-C2/D-C3 inherited verbatim): first-run produced 9/10 PASS with one fail at ('qdro' in family_law_attorney_voicemail content) — content had spelled-out 'qualified-domestic-relations-order' but lacked the QDRO acronym substring. Single-token in-session iteration at Step 3.5 inserted the parenthetical acronym '(QDRO)' adjacent to the spelled-out form. Re-run produced 10/10 PASS. Logged transparently in step_3_5_pre_flight.iteration_log per the M11a-extension D-C2.attempt2.C in-session iteration precedent (NOT counted as rejection-and-retry).

Step 6 8-gram drift overlap check (M11a-extension D-C1.3 + M11a-extension-extension C2 in-session single-clause revision precedent): first-run produced 1 inadvertent 8-gram overlap from test_v33 intent #1 ('election before five p.m. Pacific today — the') vs test_v31 intent #3 (Northwestern Mutual term-life convertibility-window submit-the-election framing). Single-clause in-session step-6 revision substituted intent #1 phrase 'election before five p.m. Pacific today — the three' → 'election ahead of the five-p.m.-Pacific cutoff this afternoon — the three' which broke the 8-token sequence at the 'before/ahead/cutoff/afternoon' replacement points. Step 6 re-run PASSed with 0 8-gram overlaps vs 13503 prior dev/test 8-grams across 27 prior trace definitions; the substantive content of GT1 + briefing + intents #2..#5 + all 4 distractors stayed bytewise unchanged through the revision. Disclosed transparently for reviewer audit per M11a-extension-extension D-C2.attempt1.C in-session iteration precedent (NOT counted as rejection-and-retry — this is a single-clause substitution that broke the overlap with the substantive trace bytewise stable, NOT a multi-clause fresh-redraft per M11a-extension D-C7/C9 precedent).
